chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reasons for the Obligation of Zakat

text: قَالَ [اَلشَّيْخُ اَلسَّعِيدُ اَلْفَقِيهُ] أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ اَلْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُوسَى بْنِ بَابَوَيْهِ اَلْقُمِّيُّ ، [مُصَنِّفُ هَذَا اَلْكِتَابِ] رَضِيَ اَللَّهُ عَنْهُ وَ أَسْكَنَهُ جَنَّتَهُ

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: The virtuous and learned Sheikh, Abu Ja'far Muhammad ibn Ali ibn al-Husayn ibn Musa ibn Babawayh al-Qummi, the author of this book—may Allah (swt) be pleased with him and grant him abode in His Paradise—wrote:
